summaries.title: Dashboard feature flowcharts tab
summaries.summary: The lesson explains how to add a static React/Tailwind documentation view (Flowcharts tab) to the SuperRoo dashboard by registering it via view imports, PAGES entries, pageLabel entries, and Sidebar NAV items, avoiding runtime dependencies like Mermaid. It emphasizes validating UI changes with `pnpm --dir cloud/dashboard lint` and `pnpm --dir cloud/dashboard build`, and warns that lucide icon names must match the installed `lucide-react` version to prevent Next.js type-checking failures.
